programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Places
programme.desc: With extraordinary cinematography filmed in Hawaii, Costa Rica, New England, the California Redwoods, the Rocky Mountains, the Olympic Rain Forest, the Pacific Coast, Bali and the Sacred Canyons of the Southwest you'll have a glimpse of some of the most unique, beautiful places in the world.

programme.title: The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Sit back and relax as you enjoy the sights and the scenes that bring you the colors and moods of the Four Seasons.

programme.title: The Wonders of Bali
programme.desc: Bring the exotic sights and sounds of Bali's island paradise into your home with the sounds of nature and beautiful Balinese Music.

programme.title: Mountain Lakes, United States
programme.desc: Enjoy the spectacular scenery surrounding some of the most beautiful lakes in the world, including Lake Tahoe, Crater Lake, and Golden Lake.

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Waterfalls
programme.desc: From world famous Yosemite Falls in California to the spectacular Victoria Falls in Africa, you'll witness some of the most spectacular and beautiful waterfalls on earth.

programme.title: The Wonders of Hawaii
programme.desc: Hawaii's delightful beaches reveal multi-hued sands as the warm ocean washes over your feet. Feel the ocean spray leap into rainbows, as seawater roars from hidden blowholes.

programme.title: Mystic Canyons
programme.desc: Wonder at the bizarre landscape of towering mazes and rose-tinted natural amphitheaters.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Space & Planets
programme.desc: This compilation is about Space & Planets! Includes children's songs "Mr. Golden Sun", “Skidamarink” & "More!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Animals
programme.desc: This is all about Animals! Includes children's favorites “Alice the Camel”, “Let’s Go To Zoo” and More!

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums - Super Simple Collection 2
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are back with all new adventures! Join Humble, Stumble and Grumble as they bounce, climb, fly.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: The Bumble Nums - Super Simple Collection 1
programme.desc: Once Humble, Grumble, and Stumble make it to their kitchen with ingredient intact, it's time to make the dish.

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Joy lives in Kenya. Some wild animals from the national park escaped and they are making mayhem in the village! A boy and his Dad in Gwangju Korea need to get a giant watermelon they've grown on their farm in the mountains to a contest in town. Jett delivers a giant slide to help, but the watermelon bounces out of the slide and causes a calamity, knocking over some rare rocks.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: As a tornado bears down on Turkey's Iztuzu Beach, Sevgi wants to bury sand nest for the endangered Loggerhead turtle eggs and save them from the wind. So Jett delivers her a set of digging tools. Jett flies to Sainte-Marguerite Island and delivers an inflatable boat to a boy named Emile. Emile needs the boat to bring a giant robot statue that he made out of lemons to be a float in a parade.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When Grand Albert loses his camera that has the ability to make things bigger or smaller it's found by a girl in Egypt who is babysitting her baby brother. The camera turns him into a giant baby. A boy, Henri, is given a riding toy truck by his goofball Dad. When it gets dirt, Jett brings a Car Wash Kit to them and together they wash all the dirty cars/trucks in town.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett is excited as he is ready to go on his 300th mission and if he is successful, he will go into the SW Hall of Fame and become a Legendary Super Wing. Jett has to control the fallout from Golden Boy's interference which has lead to the release of a 'dinosaur' from an iceberg in Greenland. The dinosaur takes off with Eric, a local boy that Jett had come to Greenland to help.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Laerke wants to tune-up an old steam locomotive so he can join his friends at the Danish Railway Museum. Jett delivers a train repair kit. Niphavanh needs a large flower basket for That Luang, the biggest festival in Laos. There, Niphavanh will circle the Pha That Luang monument and make a wish: to visit outer space! Jett delivers, as always, but complications arise when Golden Boy appears.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Finnley, winner of the "One Day Delivery Experience" comes to World Aircraft to go on a delivery with Jett! The delivery takes them to Shanghai, China, where a girl named Yenching needs an action camera to film a cooking video. While Astra is working at her space station, Golden Boy learns that all delivery orders are patched through her satellite. He and Golden Wheels take over the station.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Helen needs a torch pod for the opening torch relay ceremony of the International Children’s Games. She needs the Super Wings to perform the torch relay! When her elephant sanctuary floods in Chiang Mai, Thailand, Kulap orders elephant-sized life jackets and water wings so she can guide the elephants to safety. A baby white elephant is separated from the group and carried away by water currents.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Abu is exploring the excavations at Petra in Jordan with his uncle. But there's a big problem: he forgot to bring along one of his prized toy robots. Jett flies to Erfoud, Morocco, and delivers a fossil detector to a boy named Kamal who wants to find a rare fossil to complete his collection. Jett and Kamal find themselves in an underground lake with a live, ancient whale called a Basilosaurus!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers recycling boxes to George, a young boy who worries that the dirty beaches of Mantanani Island will stop his friend Duggy the Dugong from visiting. Jett, George, and his Grandpa discover an island of rubbish floating in the sea. Jett delivers a telescope to Amélie who is at the Louvre Museum with her mom. Things go awry when the Mona Lisa is stolen...and Amélie's mom disappears, too!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Riley is in Singapore visiting his friend Lifen who is a local movie star. Golden Boy is a huge fan of Lifen's and wants to be in the movie with her.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Maggie wants to be a buddy-cop-duo with her pet Chihuahua, Kiki, and help people in need. So, Jett delivers police costumes and joins them in patrolling the town. Jett flies to Hamburg to deliver a pair of mini vacuum cleaners to help Lars and his Dad clean up a spillage of popcorn across their impressive model village. They have trouble reaching popcorn inside the village's train tunnel.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Peiru and her dad are hiking the Great Wall of China in Beijing. Heavy snowfall has made the Great Wall difficult to traverse, so Peiru orders winter hiking gear. Dale wants to be in an underwater bike race with his dad, and help him win. So Jett delivers a tandem bicycle and agrees to join their team. Things take a turn when Golden Boy enters the race and sends them off-course.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A toddler in South Korea named Ha-Jun has a cold but doesn't like the taste of the medicine that his Dad needs to give him. Ha-Jun's sister Yuna calls the Super Wings for help. A boy named Geir in Iceland goes with his Mom on a tour to see arctic foxes in their natural habitat. Geir orders an arctic fox costume to wear so the shy foxes will come out of their caves and meet him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a huge inflatable sword to Neele, an accessory for the balloon version of the legendary dragon-fighter Siegfried she is flying with her Papa in the annual balloon festival. Fabio loves soccer but he is not interested in history. At the San Augustin Archeological Park, he accidentally drops his ball into one of the sites with many ancient statues! Jett delivers him a stretchy claw.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Alani notices that the sea level is rising around the island of Tuvalu she orders a huge lifeboat for all the people in her village to ride on. Jett finds himself stuck in ice in Antarctica courtesy of Golden Boy, Golden Wheels, and a giant Golden Robot. He is rescued by World Aircraft and learns that Golden Boy has caused lots of global warming problems around the planet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A passenger airplane bound for Italy has to make an emergency landing on World Aircraft. When Lime offers to prepare a meal for the passengers, Mano, a young boy passenger, makes a popular suggestion: pizza! Ratu and his Dad are excited about a "survival challenge" on one of Fiji's Desert Islands, but they forgot to bring their survival guide to teach them how to filter water!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers flowery mooncakes to Meilin, a young girl who wants to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival by leaving a gift for the Moon Lady, who is said to descend from the moon according to Chinese folklore. A girl named Emma lives in Transinne, Belgium and she asks the Super Wings if they can help her with her solar system school project.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Astra and Rover continue to help Emma, her Dad, and spaceship Rick see the solar system. Trouble is Golden Boy and Golden Wheels tag along! Jett delivers a claw grabber to Marcia, a little girl playing a treasure hunt game in which she searches for hidden treasure notes in the Rio Abiseo National Park in Peru. Our Super Wing helps her in her search!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. Join us to dance along to classical melodies as we learn animal names through narration and repetition or simply enjoy seeing live-action footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Booya Non-Stop
programme.desc: Follow the hilarious adventures of five adorable kooky monsters who live under a kid's bed. Living under the bed is easy and kind of safe but these adorable characters are impulsive, curious, and always ready for fun adventures. With a playful dog who is bent on messing up their plans, the group keeps venturing out, finding ways to dodge the snoopy sniffy, creating chaos and laughter around them.

programme.title: Baby Shark + More Baby Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Let's groove to the Baby Shark Song !! Kids songs and nursery rhymes that the little ones will love. Come join Farmees as they sing along and dance to these kids rhymes like animal sound song, ten in the bed, five little ducks, Incy wincy spider, five little speckled frogs, humpty dumpty, jack and jill, rig a jig jig, miss polly had a dolly, the muffin man, phonics song and many more baby songs.

programme.title: Wash Your Hands & Healthy Habits Song - Super Supremes
programme.desc: Join your favorite nursery rhymes characters, Super Supremes on their fun adventures of learning. Learn to wash your hands and sing along with this healthy habits song and more popular baby songs like Soccer Song, Bath Time Song, Swimming Song, Yes Yes Song, Boo Boo Song, Please and Thank You, Zoo Song, Growing Up Song, Finger Family, Three Little Kittens and many more kids rhymes.

programme.title: PreBeez - Non Stop
programme.desc: Go on a fun educational adventure with Preebeez, where your 2 - 5 year old baby can enjoy popular easy to learn nursery rhymes & educational kids stories for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing, read and dance along. Also watch out for more kids songs like wheels on the bus, head shoulder knees, finger family, five little monkeys, and toes, ten in the bed, animal songs and more.

programme.title: Boo Boo Song + More Nursery Rhymes and Kids Songs by Super Supremes
programme.desc: Do you know that even superheroes get boo boo’s?! Let us see how the super supremes look after themselves.Super supremes is a kids tv show where you can learn nursery rhymes and baby songs like boo boo song, alphabets, numbers, colors, shapes, fruits, 123, abc, animals sounds and a lot more . Come join the super supremes in this preschool adventure.

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Kids Songs by Bob The Train
programme.desc: Let's dance to the Baby Shark song!! Come join Bob the train in his preschool nursery rhymes & kids songs for babies & toddlers like balloon song, no no song, five little babies, bath song, this is the way, rain rain go away, incy wincy spider, johny johny, humpty dumpty, rig a jig jig, zoo song, wheels on the bus, pat a cake, ten in the bed, three little kittens, and more baby songs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik timetravels back to Mobigypt, makes himself a pharoah, and enslaves everbody in an effort to find the gemstone of immortality.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia discovers that the watch she received from her friend is actually a monitoring device for the Robotnik Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry has become obsessed with the mystery book detective heroine, Patti Persimmon. She decorates her store with Patti posters and rearranges her shelves to make room for all the Patti books she's ordered. Blueberry begins to neglect outings with her friends and even goes so far as to dress like her idol just to emulate her. She then starts looking for cases to solve around town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The grove around Berry Bitty City is abuzz with activity. The Berrykins are using their sparkles to harvest berries, Berrykin Bloom is in his garden spraying flowers with a special solution to make them larger, and Raspberry is nearby gathering flower petals to make perfume. The wind starts to blow and picks up some of the sparkles. The sparkles float along the wind and get combined with some of Berrykin Bloom's solution.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon; it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. He tries hard, but just can't seem to do it! More importantly, he's not even having fun anymore. After some advice from Barney and Terry, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky. With a little imagination and help from Barney and friends, she replaces the star that fell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Everyone loves Barney! When Ryan tries to be just like Barney, he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Ryan soon learns that he is special when he's just being himself! Baby Bop is having one of those days! Every time she turns around, someone is telling her no! As her frustration grows, Barney explains that the word no can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: There's a fishing contest in the park! When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells The Emperor's Contest and Ryan discovers that honesty is the best policy. When Riff meets a friend who can't hear well, Riff wonders if he would still like music. Barney tells everyone about Beethoven, a famous musician who wrote beautiful music even though he couldn't hear it.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Everyone is excited for Halloween tonight! Everyone knows what they're going to be for Halloween. BJ is going to be a pirate, Melanie is going to be a cat, David will be a superhero, and Baby Bop is going to be a ballerina princess. Everyone has decided on a costume all except for Riff. Barney tries to give Riff ideas on a costume like a sailor, a firefighter, or a dancer. Riff surprises everyone in the end by wearing a one-man band costume. Then, it's time for the Halloween party to begin! Barney and his friends have fun Trick-or-Treating in the park at night. But when Ramon loses all his Halloween candies, BJ shares his Halloween candies with him.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ feels left out when the kids have a Dog Show to show off their pets. BJ doesn't have a dog and wishes he did! A friend shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun. Barney's friends are having a hard time deciding what to do because everyone wants to do the same thing! Barney's Native American tale, The Chase, shows them that it's best to think for themselves and not follow the crowd.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After watching birds fly overhead, Riff begins to daydream of flying. He decides to build his very own rocket ship and fly to Mars. The flight is not exactly a success, but Barney encourages Riff to never give up on his dream. After seeing many moms playing with their kids in the park, Baby Bop is curious as to what makes somebody a mommy. With Barney's help, Baby Bop learns all about what makes mommies so special.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller; she's convinced it's shrinking. But Barney shows her that, actually, Baby Bop is growing. When Riff takes a bite of ice cream, he realizes has a very sore tooth. Afraid of going to the dentist, Barney and his friends put on a show to help Riff see there is nothing to be afraid of - the dentist is his friend.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop, BJ and the children prepare for the Shapes Carnival in the park. Riff knows he will do well at the carnival because he is wearing his lucky medal. When he loses the medal, Riff is afraid he wont be able to play the games. With Barneys guidance, Riff has fun playing the games and he realizes he didnt need his lucky medal play and have fun. When it starts to rain at the park, Baby Bop joins Barney and BJ inside the caboose. Baby Bop pokes her head out to see if the rain has stopped and spies a beautiful rainbow in the sky! When the others come to see itits gone. Baby Bop is very disappointed because she liked all the pretty colors, so Barney and the others paint their own life-sized rainbow. When it starts to rain again, the homemade rainbow falls down and gets all wet. Luckily, a real rainbow takes its place!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: An ordinary game of hide and seek takes a not-so-ordinary turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park! Barney and Riff are happy to play along, but BJ thinks that his sister may be seeing things. Fortunately, Barney takes this opportunity to help the young dinos learn about their sense of sight while having tons of fun! BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find (or make) the loudest sound in the park. The playful competition continues to escalateand along the way, the sounds of animals, musical instruments, and even fire engines are introduced.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. When Barney introduces Riff to some of his friends in the park, its Baby Bop that ends up feeling less-than-special as the kids seem more impressed with Riff and his special talents. Barney helps Baby Bop realize that theres more to being special than the things you can do. The way you feel and the way you make others feel makes you special, too. Its a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival. BJ and Riff share some musical art and Baby Bop shares a painting of a very special friendBarney! As the festival comes to an end, Barney reminds his friends everywhere that no matter what kind of art they make, its always special when it comes from their hearts!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide hell need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching. By the end of the day, everyone finds out that there are many fun ways to exercise. When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better. He has a dream about a snack fantasyland where he eats as many sweets as he wants and ends up with a big stomachache. When he wakes up, hes happy to find out it was only a dream. When he asks for a healthy snack, his friends are happy to oblige.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. Since Baby Bop has not learned to count yet, Barney offers to help teach her so she can participate. In the end, Baby Bop learns to count and realizes that feeling good about herself is the greatest treasure in the world! Its time for a music concert in the park. As Riff works on his one-man band, the others make posters for the show. Everyone enjoys Riffs calypso rendition of a favorite song, and they all enjoy helping each other.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a much bigger responsibility than he ever expected when he offers to take care of a friends dog. When he accidentally loses the dog, everyone has to work together to find it. When Baby Bops favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the veterinarian for help. Barney and Riff pretend to be veterinarians. They show Baby Bop that theres nothing to be afraid of, because doctors and veterinarians are our friends too.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, its Barney that helps her see that winter can be a wonderful time for fun. Baby Bop is getting discouraged, wondering if it will ever snow. Then, when she least expects itthe snow begins to fall! On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the fun activities you can do during the summer. BJ gets so excited that he corrals Riff into joining him to do a whole summers worth of activities, all in one day! With some help from Baby Bop and the children, Barney teaches BJ that summer means relaxation, too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Its a very special day at the Parkits Barneys birthday, and there are surprises around every corner. When Barney begins to open his presents, Riff worries that his hand-made gift wont be good enough. In the end, Barney loves Riffs gift and reminds everyone that the best gift of all is one that comes from the heart. Baby Bop is practicing her marching because she will be joining a real marching rhythm band and is having trouble keeping a beat. Barney, BJ and Riff help Baby Bop learn about rhythm just in time for her to join the band.

programme.title: Frank Ferrante's Groucho
programme.desc: Frank Ferrantes GROUCHO, the filmed version of the long-running stage comedy An Evening With Groucho, paints a laughter-filled, theatrical portrait of legendary comedian Groucho Marx Actor Frank Ferrante portrays Marx in the role hes performed for over thirty-five years in more than 500 cities. Frank Ferrantes GROUCHO celebrates the style and spirit of Marx through songs, stories, improvisation and audience interaction. Music from Marxs Broadway and film career including Lydia, the Tattooed Lady and theme song Hooray For Captain Spaulding are featured along with one-liners from the Marx Brothers film classics The Cocoanuts and Animal Crackers. Marx, who died in 1977 at age 86, conquered every medium during his 72-year career and was referred to by The New York Times as Americas most gifted funny man.For the Groucho role, Ferrante received New Yorks Theatre World Award, Londons Laurence Olivier Award nomination and New Yorks Outer Critics Circle nomination. In 2019, he was chosen as a top ten stage performer by the Chicago Tribune for his role as The Caesar in the cirque show Teatro ZinZanni. In 2017, The Wall Street Journal picked Ferrante as a top ten actor for his role as Pseudolus in the Stephen Sondheim musical A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum at Philadelphias Walnut Street Theatre.Filmed at the two-time Tony Award-winning Cincinnati Playhouse in the Park, GROUCHO is directed and edited by independent filmmaker and acclaimed aerial choreographer Dreya Weber (The Gymnast, The Aerialist, Finding Magic Mike). Music director Gerald Sternbach (Mel Brooks Live at the Geffen, Carrie Fishers Wishful Drinking) accompanies, and set and lighting designers Tamara L. Honesty and Mark Williams round out the production.

programme.title: Maggie's War
programme.desc: James Megellas, affectionately known as Maggie, led H-Company of the 504th Parachute Infantry Regiment through some of the most horrific battles and deadliest missions of World War II, including the Battle of Anzio, Operation Market Garden and the Battle of the Bulge. MAGGIE'S WAR chronicles the evolution of a citizen into a fearless platoon leader, and the transformation of a young man into the most highly decorated officer in the history of the famed 82nd Airborne Division. Seven decades later, cameras follow Megellas, now a retired Lieutenant Colonel, on an emotional return to Europe with a small group of family, friends and 82nd Airborne veterans. Together they visit old battlefields and war memorials and encounter Dutch citizens still grateful for their sacrifice.

programme.title: The Misty Experiment: The Secret Battle for the Ho Chi Minh Trail
programme.desc: THE MISTY EXPERIMENT: THE SECRET BATTLE FOR THE HO CHI MINH TRAIL is an hour-long documentary that profiles a special U.S. Air Force squadron whose pilots volunteered for one of the wars most dangerous air missions. Their assignment: search for enemy supply transports and anti-aircraft installations concealed within the web of trail paths and waterways collectively known as the Ho Chi Minh Trail. The squadron also directed on-site rescue operations for U.S. and allied aircrews shot down while flying over the jungles of North Vietnam and Laos.The activities of Operation Commando Sabre, the official name of the mission, were classified as top secret during and immediately following the war. This documentary shares the story of the Misty squadron as told solely through the recollections of the veterans who volunteered for the mission. Their stories are enhanced by never-before-seen squadron footage and general archival combat footage from the war.

programme.title: Remember Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: The focus of this film is on the military and civilian survivors of Pearl Harbor, all of whom had totally different experiences onDecember 7, 1941.

programme.title: Rommel: The Soldier, The Son, and Hitler
programme.desc: ROMMEL: THE SOLDIER, THE SON, AND HITLER provides rare insight into the military career and personal life of Germany's most famous WWII commander, Field Marshal Erwin Rommel. Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. Never a member of the Nazi party, Rommel detested the blending of politics and war. He would quickly discover that both were always in play in Hitler's Germany.Rommel was somewhat nave to Hitler's ways until the latter days of the Afrika Korps defeat in North Africa in 1943. By then, Rommel started to surmise that Germany's fate was sealed. In charge of the famed and flawed Atlantic Wall in western Europe in late 1943, Rommel tried his best to prepare France for the Allied invasion. In the end, it would not be enough. D-Day's success only reinforced Rommel's belief that Adolf Hitler should sue for peace in the west.It was an opinion that Hitler found treasonous.

programme.title: Cuba: The Forgotten Revolution
programme.desc: CUBA: THE FORGOTTEN REVOLUTION tells the virtually unknown story of Cuban revolutionaries Frank Pais and Juan Antonio Echeverria a school teacher and architecture student whose names seldom appear alongside their more famous contemporaries, Fidel Castro and Che Guevara. These young men, who worked independently from each other, played critical roles in the eventual overthrow of dictator Fulgencio Batista y Zaldva in 1950s Cuba.New scholarship and recently accessed footage challenge the prevailing view in part advanced by Che Guevara that Castro's army of 200 guerillas single-handedly defeated tens of thousands of Batista's professional soldiers and liberated the people of Cuba. In actuality, Pais and Echeverria's insurgencies in Santiago and Havana held the key to generating popular support for resistance and undermining the authority of Batista and his secret police. Both Pais and Echeverria rivaled Castro in popularity and power during the height of the Revolution, yet neither man lived to see the movement succeed. Pais was gunned down in the street and Echeverria died in a daring raid on the palace.The film highlights the complexities inherent in revolutions and examines the shaping (and reshaping) of the final historical record. After Castro assumed power in 1959, he harnessed the power of television to set forth a narrative that effectively removed Pais and Echeverria from the record. Through archival stock footage and exclusive interviews with Cuban revolution participants and observers, family members, people who fought alongside Castro and Guevara, and a former CIA agent, we learn about Cubas forgotten revolutionaries.
